ConstructorArguments: The camera's zFar distance. This is the furthest distance this camera will be able to render. This value totally depends on the game you're making. Shorter the better, sensible ranges would be between about 1000 and 30000, but if you want it to be further out you can balance that out by making znear larger.

Documentation.Summary:
The camera's zFar distance. This is the furthest distance this camera will be able to render.
This value totally depends on the game you're making. Shorter the better, sensible ranges would be
between about 1000 and 30000, but if you want it to be further out you can balance that out by making
znear larger.

ConstructorArguments: The camera's zNear distance. This is the closest distance this camera will be able to render. A good value for this is about 5. Below 5 and particularly below 1 you're going to start to see a lot of artifacts like z-fighting.

Documentation.Summary:
The camera's zNear distance. This is the closest distance this camera will be able to render.
A good value for this is about 5. Below 5 and particularly below 1 you're going to start to see
a lot of artifacts like z-fighting.
